## Meeting Purpose

[Executive interview with Jose Farias for a Full Stack Engineer (Product focus) position at GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jose has extensive experience with Rails, including work at 37signals (Basecamp) and Harvest](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [GrowthX is developing an agency OS with AI-powered workflows and potential spin-off products](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Jose is interested in joining GrowthX, pending a competitive offer and timing considerations](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4017.0)
  - [GrowthX plans to fundraise in November, making early September an ideal start date for new hires](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4360.0)

## Topics

### Jose's Background and Experience

  - [Started career as a Rails developer in Mexico, quickly advancing to CTO/COO role](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Worked at Magma Labs, then Arrows (early-stage startup)](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Spent 2.5 years at 37signals as the primary Basecamp programmer](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Currently at Harvest, which was recently acquired by Bending Spoons](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4116.0)

### GrowthX's Product Vision and Strategy

  - [Developing an agency OS with 200+ AI workflows for content creation and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Planning to extract standalone products from agency tools (e.g., analytics, image generation)](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Building an AI infrastructure for automating various tasks and processes](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Exploring "services as software" model, leveraging AI to enable one person to do the work of many](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)

### Potential Role and Responsibilities

  - [Jose could join the team working on a new analytics product, starting in early September](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4360.0)
  - [Project aims to have a usable version by end of September](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4360.0)
  - [Team would include Daniel, Ren (head of design), possibly Brad, and potentially Pedro](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4360.0)

### Compensation and Timing Considerations

  - [Jose's current compensation at Harvest is around $219k (including benefits)](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4677.0)
  - [GrowthX is preparing an offer, aiming to be competitive and near the top of the position's range](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4360.0)
  - [Potential start date in early September, allowing for paternity leave benefits (due in November)](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4360.0)
  - [GrowthX is considering fundraising in November, making earlier start dates more advantageous for equity](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4360.0)

### Cultural Fit and Work Style

  - [Jose values the opportunity to use his full skill set, which aligns well with GrowthX's needs](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4022.0)
  - [Discussion about balancing code quality with speed of iteration, contrasting with 37signals' approach](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4569.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to prepare and send an offer to Jose by tomorrow morning](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4845.0)
  - [Jose to connect Daniel with Rosa (from 37signals) for a reference check](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4819.0)
  - [Jose to review the offer and potentially give notice at Harvest on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4322.0)
  - [If accepted, Jose could start at GrowthX in early September](https://fathom.video/share/zUw45RCo1UyWRPkVdze3o943DvfAKAs6?tab=summary&timestamp=4473.0)
